LAW AND MOTION 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES' PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. COURT AWARDS REASONABLE ATTORNEYS FEES IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,872.50. PETITIONER MAY BE AWARDED COSTS AS MAY BE PERMITTED BY LAW, BUT THESE WILL NOT BE DETERMINED IN THIS PETITION. (THE PETITIONER MUST PROVIDE COPIES OF "EXHIBITS A & B" REFERRED TO IN PROPOSED ORDER, BUT NOT ATTACHED, BEFORE THE COURT CAN SIGN THE PROPOSED ORDER SUBMITTED WITH MOVING PAPERS, REVISED AS DESCRIBED HEREIN.) JUDGE: MARLA J. MILLER; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR # 7077.

RULING - RESPONDENT JAMES CHUN KIN LEUNG'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED BECAUSE OF NO APPEARANCE BY THE RESPONDENT DESPITE A HEARING WAS REQUIRED. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM

Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award; Index Of Federal Authorities In Support
Off Calendar Dec-19-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES' Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award is Granted. No opposition filed. Court awards reasonable attorneys fees in the amount of $1,872.50. Petitioner may be awarded costs as may be permitted by law, but these will not be determined in this petition. (The Petitioner must provide copies of "exhibits A & B" referred to in proposed order, but not attached, before the court can sign the proposed order submitted with moving papers, revised as described herein.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR # 7077.
